ques: List the benefits of hugging face classroom mentioned on Hugging face website.
answer: Hugging Face for Classrooms (huggingface.co/classrooms) offers these benefits, all free: (1) Free resources, teaching materials & support for students and teachers, turning class into a collaborative ML-building environment with open-source tools and state-of-the-art models; (2) Empower students with state-of-the-art resources — implement ML and collaborate on datasets, models, and demos hosted in your classroom workspace; (3) Unlimited access to modern ML tools — upload datasets/models/demos, train, fine-tune, experiment, deploy, and share with the classroom or community, all hosted free; (4) Easily manage your classroom — centralize datasets/models/demos in one place with version control and student access controls (admin, read, write), shareable privately or publicly.
